form.formComment: Has finished last in her last couple of starts, most recently at Warragul over 400m. On best form is more than capable. Keep safe.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (24.79) when second at this track in a Grade 5. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running last time with a fast early split and never headed, leading throughout to win by 2.25 lengths (24.47) over 435m at this track. Key chance on that latest effort.

formComments.comment: Hit the ground running last time with a fast early split and never headed, leading throughout to win by 2.25 lengths (24.47) over 435m at this track. Key chance on that latest effort.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 1 over 435m at this track behind Mugshot beaten 7 lengths (24.79). Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won by half a length at Warragul (23.28) beating Something Clever in a Grade 5 on March 26. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Warragul over 400m in 23.47. Followed that up with a minor placing over 390m at Ballarat at Grade 5 six days ago. Rates among the chances this time.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording three minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when third (22.66) over 400m at Warragul. Overdue for a win and gets her chance this time.

form.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (22.92) over 400m at Geelong. Boxed out wide and will need the right run to feature.
